text: Did you see what they're doing to the Whetstone Brook trail? Closing it through August. Half my guests are going to ask me about hiking and I'm going to have nothing good to tell them.
Ugh, seriously? That's the one everyone wants. What's the reason this time?
Erosion repair, apparently. Elaine already asked me to print updated trail maps. So that's my Monday sorted.
At least you're ahead of it. Kevin was saying the downtown farmer's market is moving too — new location near the parking garage?
Heard that. Honestly might be better. Parking was a nightmare on Saturdays. Brian took me once and we circled for 20 minutes.
Ha. Classic Brattleboro summer problem. Any other fun news or is it all construction and closures?
Pretty much. Oh — that old inn on Putney Road finally sold. Some developer. Pat, if they turn it into another short-term rental complex Elaine is going to lose her mind.
Can't blame her. You two are already stretched thin. Send me the trail map when you print it, I'll pass it to Kevin for his hiking group.
Colleen, did you see Pat's post about Kevin's retirement party? I left a comment but I'm not sure if I did it right — it might've posted twice 😬
Brian did I do this right — I replied to Danny's photo with 'looks like a good time!' and now there's a little thumbs-up thing next to my name? Happened right as I was clocking in at the inn 😅
Saw Carla's post about the Brattleboro farmers market and had to comment that I've been buying her honey for the front desk candy dish for two years 😄 figured it was time she knew.
Saw Barb's post about the leaf-peeping weekend — left her a comment but wanted to make sure she knew we're slammed at the inn through October. Brattleboro's packed this time of year 🍂
Pat just posted the funniest photo of Kevin trying to parallel park in downtown Brattleboro. I left a comment but now I'm wondering if it was too much 😅
Elaine, did you see Colleen posted that photo from her Vermont trip last fall? I commented 'finally made it back to Brattleboro 😄' — hope that wasn't too weird coming from the inn account.
Did you see Elaine's post? Left a comment but now I'm second-guessing the wording. Classic me.
Did you see what Pat posted about Brattleboro fall foliage? Left her a comment — felt like the least I could do after she drove all the way up last month 😄
Hector did you see Elaine's post about the front desk refresh? Left a comment this morning before my shift. Couldn't not say something 😄
Tom, did you see Elaine's post about the inn getting that write-up? I commented but I think I said 'so proud' and now it's just sitting there looking like I'm collecting participation ribbons 😅
